data.title: SI-BONE To Report First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, on April 20, 2026, SI-BONE, Inc. (Nasdaq: SIBN), a prominent player in creating procedural remedies for bone-related issues, disclosed plans to disclose its fiscal performance for Q1 of 2026 post-market closure on Monday, May 11, 2026. The management has scheduled a conference call to commence at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET.

data.title: Green Brick Brands and Professionals Earn Eight Honors at 2026 McSAM Awards
data.description: Green Brick Partners, Inc. based in Plano, Texas, disclosed that its homebuilding brands, including CB JENI Homes, Normandy Homes, and Southgate Homes, received a total of eight accolades at the 2026 McSAM Awards. These awards, bestowed by the Dallas Builders Association each year, acknowledge outstanding achievements in sales, marketing, and residential design within the Dallas Metroplex area. The recognition highlights the company's dedication to excellence and unique branding strategies. Green Brick Partners, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol GRBK.

data.title: Zions Bancorporation, National Association Reports First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: In Salt Lake City, Zions Bancorporation, N.A. announced on April 20, 2026, a net profit of $232 million for the first quarter of the year. This translates to earnings of $1.56 per diluted common share for the mentioned period. The company is listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbol ZION.

data.title: Royal Gold will announce Q1 2026 results on May 6, 2026.
data.description: In the latest data released, it was shown that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the job market, with over 300,000 new jobs created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the GDP growth for the same period was recorded at 5.2%, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong economic performance. Experts attribute these positive numbers to various factors including increased consumer spending, business investments, and government policies aimed at boosting growth.Overall, these indicators point towards a robust and thriving economy with promising prospects for the future.

data.title: AMCON Distributing Company Reports Results for the Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: AMCON Distributing Company, based in Omaha, Nebraska, has reported a fully diluted loss per share of $2.34 and a net loss available to common shareholders of $2.2 million for the second fiscal quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, traded on NYSE American under the ticker symbol DIT, is a Convenience and Foodservice Distributor that emphasizes proprietary foodservice programs and tailored store-level merchandising to enhance convenience distribution. Their unique approach aims to add value to their services.

data.title: NETSTREIT Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results
data.description: NETSTREIT Corp. reported its financial and operating outcomes for the first quarter of 2026. The "Company" (NYSE: NTST) mentioned a successful beginning to the year, highlighting a record-breaking number of net investments made during this quarter. Their strategic sourcing and underwriting techniques enabled them to take advantage of a favorable acquisitions market while upholding stringent risk adjusted return objectives. The Company emphasized the robust state of its balance sheet, indicating a positive outlook for future performance.

data.title: Grid Dynamics Scales Hyper-Personalization for Galeries Lafayette; Drives 7% Revenue Increase via AI-Powered Search and Merchandising
data.description: Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: GDYN) based in San Ramon, California, has revealed the implementation of a highly personalized digital shopping system for Galeries Lafayette, a renowned French department store. This involved the incorporation of Google Vertex AI Search for Commerce alongside the Grid Dynamics Merchandising Experience Platform (MXP). The move has allowed Galeries Lafayette to revamp its search, navigation, and recommendation functions, enhancing the overall shopping experience for customers from the Fortune 1000 company.

data.title: Sempra to Report First-Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 7
data.description: San Diego-based energy company Sempra (NYSE: SRE) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter financial results for 2026 at 8 a.m. ET on May 7. The company will hold a conference call with a presentation at 12 p.m. ET on the same day, led by senior executives. Investors and stakeholders can expect key insights and updates on the company's performance during this call.

data.title: BURNING MAN 2026 MAIN SALE TICKET REGISTRATION NOW OPEN
data.description: Don't miss out on the opportunity for the best prices on tickets as the 2026 Main Sale for the unique event organized by Burning Man Project in San Francisco will begin on April 29. Register now to secure your spot at this one-of-a-kind gathering. The sale offers the chance for attendees to purchase tickets at the lowest prices available, making it a highly anticipated event. Join in on the experience unlike any other festival or communal gathering globally.

data.title: Medifast to Announce Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: Baltimore-based Medifast, a leading metabolic health and wellness company (NYSE: MED), will unveil its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, on Monday, May 4, 2026, post-market closure. The company's key figures including Chairman and CEO Dan Chard, President Nick Johnson, and CFO Jim Maloney will partake in a conference call to delve into the results, providing further insights and discussions.

data.title: Tactile Medical to Release First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: Minneapolis-based medical technology company Tactile Systems Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: TCMD) disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 on Monday, May 4, 2026 after the market closes. Tactile Medical, known for offering therapies to individuals with chronic disorders, is set to provide investors and stakeholders with key insights into its recent operational and financial achievements. This announcement highlights the company's commitment to transparency and communication with the market. Stay tuned for detailed figures and analysis following the release date.
TFI International to Hold Annual Meeting of Shareholders

data.title: Superior Group of Companies to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) based in St. Petersburg, FL, revealed that it is set to unveil its first quarter 2026 performance results on May 4, 2026, before the market opens. The Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Michael Benstock, alongside President and Chief Financial Officer, Mike Koempel, will conduct a teleconference at 8:00 am Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the Company’s outcomes.

data.title: Amwell® to report first quarter 2026 operating results
data.description: Boston-based company Amwell, listed on the NYSE as AMWL, will release its operating results for the first quarter of 2026 after the stock market closes on Tuesday, May 5. Amwell is a prominent provider of a SaaS-based software platform for technology-driven healthcare services.

data.title: CNB Financial Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: CNB Financial Corporation, the parent company of CNB Bank, recently disclosed its earnings for the first quarter of 2026. The corporation, listed as CCNE on NASDAQ, operates in Clearfield, Pennsylvania.

data.title: RBB Bancorp Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.16 Per Common Share
data.description: On April 20, 2026, RBB Bancorp disclosed financial data for the quarter finishing on March 31, 2026. This Los Angeles-based company, which includes Royal Business Bank and RBB Asset Management Company, reported its results. The Company, traded on NASDAQ under RBB, shared these updates from the first quarter of the year.

data.title: Columbia Financial, Inc. Announces Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Fair Lawn-based Columbia Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLBK) announced its quarterly financial results. The company, serving as the mid-tier holding entity for Columbia Bank, disclosed a net income of $13.1 million, translating to earnings of $0.13 per basic and diluted share for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. In comparison, the figures for the same period in 2025 were $8.9 million and $0.09 per basic and diluted share, respectively. The rise in earnings was primarily due to increased net interest income resulting from a rise in interest income and a decline in interest expense. Additionally, there was a decrease in provision for credit losses. These positives were partially offset by reduced non-interest income, an increase in non-interest expense, and higher income tax expense for the quarter.

data.title: Stella McCartney Executive Sues LVMH, Alleging Retaliation, Pay Discrimination, and Pricing Misconduct
data.description: Joseph & Norinsberg LLC, a prominent employment law firm based in New York, has recently lodged a federal complaint on behalf of a U.S. executive. The executive alleges retaliation following the disclosure of purported instances of anti-competitive behavior, salary discrepancies, and withheld wages. This complaint was filed on April 20, 2026. The executive's claims highlight serious issues within the company, shedding light on potential wrongdoings. The case brings attention to the importance of protecting employees who speak out against such practices. The legal action seeks to address the alleged violations and provide necessary recourse for the affected individual.

data.title: BBOT Granted U.S. FDA Fast Track Designation for BBO-11818 for the Treatment of Adult Patients with Advanced KRAS-Mutant Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma
data.description: BBO-11818 is currently undergoing assessment in the Phase 1 KONQUER-101 study, focusing on individuals with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic solid tumors containing the KRAS mutation.
